text.title: rag-eval-retrieval-metrics Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for rag-eval-retrieval-metrics. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Always run all five retrieval metrics together, not just one. Precision@K and Hit Rate together distinguish "few but precise" from "at least one hit" retrieval failures. MRR and NDCG distinguish rank-position quality from recall breadth.
rule.rationale: A retriever can have Hit Rate=1.0 (always returns at least one relevant doc) while Precision@K=0.20 (4 out of 5 docs are irrelevant noise that pollutes the generation context). Single-metric optimization creates blind spots.
